Title: REQ-1
Content: The system shall control the front windshield wiper speed based on rain intensity

Title: SPEC-1.1
Content: The system shall support at least three wiper speed levels (low medium high)

Title: TEST-1.1
Content: Verify that the system switches to low speed when light rain is detected

Title: SPEC-1.2
Content: The system shall automatically adjust speed based on sensor input

Title: TEST-1.2
Content: Verify that the system switches to high speed during heavy rain

Title: REQ-2
Content: The system shall allow manual override of the wiper speed by the driver

Title: SPEC-2.1
Content: The driver shall be able to select wiper speed via a control lever

Title: TEST-2.1
Content: Verify that manual input overrides automatic mode

Title: REQ-3
Content: The system shall ensure safe operation in case of sensor failure

Title: SPEC-3.1
Content: The system shall default to intermittent mode if the rain sensor fails

Title: TEST-3.1
Content: Verify that intermittent mode is activated when sensor data is unavailable
